photoAssign.title: Photo Assignment

photoAssign.uploadLabel: Drag a photo or click to select
photoAssign.noResults: No assignments found in the photo.
photoAssign.tableDescription: Take a photo of the slips for this table. AI will read the IDs and assign walkers.

santisimo.title: Table Assignment before the Blessed Sacrament
santisimo.description: One of the most beautiful moments of the retreat: in the presence of Jesus in the Blessed Sacrament, the Holy Spirit guides the assignment of each walker to their table. No one arrives at a table by chance. Here's how to record it in the app:
santisimo.step1Desc: Go to menu ⋮ → "Walker Cards". Print and cut one card per walker — they include the ID and name. Fold them and have them ready.
santisimo.step2Title: The assignment before the Blessed Sacrament
santisimo.step2Desc: With prayer and in the presence of the Blessed Sacrament, cards are drawn and placed in groups — one group per table. The Holy Spirit guides each assignment.
santisimo.step3Title: Photograph each table's group of cards
santisimo.step3Desc: Once the assignment is complete, tap the 📷 button on each table card in the app. Take a photo of that table's group of cards.
santisimo.step4Title: Review and record in the app
santisimo.step4Desc: AI reads the IDs and proposes the assignments. Review them and tap "Apply" — everything is recorded in seconds.

dragDrop.title: Drag and drop (desktop)
dragDrop.desc: Drag a walker from the top section to a table's walker area. For servers, drag them to the corresponding role (Leader, Co-Leader).

tap.title: Tap to assign (mobile)
tap.desc: Tap a walker or server to select them (highlighted), then tap the destination area on a table. To remove, tap an assigned participant and use the "Remove from table" button.

photo.title: Photo with AI (new)
photo.desc: Tap the 📷 button on any table, upload a photo of the walker cards, and AI identifies the IDs and assigns automatically.

chatbot.title: Tell Jessy (AI chatbot)
chatbot.desc: Open the Jessy chatbot and tell it who goes to which table in natural language. For example: "Put walker 12 at table 3". Jessy understands natural language and makes the assignment directly.

colors.title: What do the colors mean?
colors.desc: The colored border on each card indicates that walker shares a family or friendship bond with others of the same color. The app prevents two people of the same color from being placed at the same table, so everyone has the chance to make new friends.
colors.noColor: No color: the walker has no registered bonds.

unassign.title: Remove a participant from a table
unassign.desc: On mobile: tap the assigned participant → a red "Remove from table" button appears at the bottom. On desktop: drag the participant back to the unassigned section.

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: At Emmaus Retreats, we value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you use our platform and services.

information.title: Information We Collect
information.content: We collect the following personal information to provide you with our services:

items.personal: Name, last name, date of birth, and marital status
items.contact: Address, phone, email, and social media
items.demographic: Information about occupation, sacraments received, and parish

use.title: Use of Your Information
use.content: We use your personal information for the following purposes:

items.registration: Process your registration for Emmaus retreats and communities
items.communication: Communicate with you about retreats, events, and updates
items.improvement: Improve our services and user experience

protection.title: Data Protection
protection.content: We implement technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, alteration, or destruction. This includes data encryption, access controls, and regular security audits.

cookies.title: Cookies and Similar Technologies
cookies.content: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience, remember your preferences, and analyze site traffic. You can configure your browser to refuse cookies, though this may affect some functionalities.

thirdParties.title: Third Parties
thirdParties.content: We share your information with third parties only in the following circumstances:
thirdParties.google: Google: We use Google Maps and Google reCAPTCHA. See Google's privacy policy.
thirdParties.recaptcha: reCAPTCHA: We use Google's reCAPTCHA v3 to protect our forms from bots and abuse. The service analyzes device behavior to verify you are human.

items.access: Request access to your personal data
items.deletion: Request deletion of your personal data
items.objection: Object to processing of your data

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have questions about this privacy policy or how we handle your data, please contact us:

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: Welcome to Emmaus Retreats. These terms and conditions govern the use of our platform and services. By accessing and using our services, you accept these terms in full.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By creating an account and using our services, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these terms and conditions, as well as our privacy policy.

responsibilities.title: User Responsibilities
responsibilities.content: As a user of our platform, you commit to:

items.accurate: Provide accurate, truthful, and complete information during registration
items.password: Maintain the confidentiality of your password and account
items.conduct: Refrain from any conduct that could harm the platform or violate applicable laws
items.legal: Comply with all laws and regulations applicable when using our services

dataAccuracy.title: Data Accuracy
dataAccuracy.content: You are responsible for keeping your account information up to date. Inaccurate information may result in the suspension or termination of your account.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.content: Your use of our services is also governed by our Privacy Policy, which describes how we collect, use, and protect your personal data. Please review our Privacy Policy to understand our practices.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.content: Emmaus Retreats shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages resulting from the use or inability to use our services. This includes, but is not limited to, damages for loss of data, profits, or business opportunities.

termination.title: Termination
termination.content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account at any time if you violate these terms or for any other reason at our discretion. You may also terminate your account at any time by contacting us.

intellectual.title: Intellectual Property
intellectual.content: All content, design, and functionality of our platform is protected by copyright and other intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works of our content without prior written permission.

modifications.title: Modifications to Terms
modifications.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Modifications will be effective as soon as they are posted on the platform. Your continued use of the services after such modifications constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

law.title: Governing Law
law.content: These terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws applicable in the relevant jurisdiction. Any dispute related to these terms will be resolved in the competent courts.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have questions about these terms and conditions, please contact us:

santisimo.title: Chapel Watch Schedule
santisimo.subtitle: Organize Eucharistic adoration hours and accept public sign-ups.
santisimo.generateHint: Automatically creates slots between two dates. Existing slots at the same hour are preserved.
santisimo.clearExistingHelp: Deletes ALL current slots and sign-ups for the retreat before creating the new ones. Use only if you want to start from scratch. If left unchecked, new slots are added and existing ones are not duplicated.
santisimo.noSlots: No slots yet. Use 'Generate slots' to create them.
santisimo.name: Name
santisimo.confirmDeleteSlot: Delete this slot and all its sign-ups?
santisimo.signupHint: Pick the hours you can accompany the Blessed Sacrament. Only the name is required.
santisimo.successBody: Keep these links in case you need to cancel later.
santisimo.cancelFailure: Could not cancel (it may have already been canceled).
santisimo.retreatNotFound: Retreat not found or public sign-up is not enabled.
santisimo.noServerMatch: No match. Switch to Free name to enter a custom name.
santisimo.angelitoHint: Free-form name for someone not in the system
santisimo.mealWindowHint: Servers seated at a table are eating during this window. Assign only free-name angelitos or servers without a table.
santisimo.helpTitle: How the Chapel Watch schedule works
santisimo.helpIntro: Quick summary of the sign-up flow and color codes.
santisimo.helpAutoBody: When the retreat's minute-by-minute schedule is materialized, Chapel Watch slots are created automatically covering the span of 'santísimo'-type template items. You don't need to use the "Generate" button for standard retreats.
santisimo.helpMealBody: Amber slots overlap with meals or dynamics that block attendance (table servers are eating). Only off-table servers (angelitos) or free names can sign up there.
santisimo.helpManualBody: The "Generate" button is still available to create slots with a custom range/duration. It is idempotent: it won't duplicate slots or delete existing sign-ups unless you check "Remove existing slots".
santisimo.helpSignupBody: On amber slots, the server search hides anyone seated at a table. Available angelitos are auto-assigned when the template is materialized.
santisimo.autoAssignHint: Recomputes meal windows and distributes available angelitos across blocked slots.
santisimo.autoAssignSummary: {meal} meal windows · {assigned} angelitos assigned · {pending} slots unfilled
